TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ulay Itiniay i Wulai Cen no New Taipei City ko Ulay a niyaro', 871 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,734 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 41% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 1,130 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 59% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,604 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal37%, Amis2%, Bunun1%, Paiwan1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'. Ulay Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Ulay a niyaro', 45 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 210 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 204 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal95%, Bunun1%, Saysiyat0.5%, roma0.5%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'. Ulay Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Ulay a niyaro', 189 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 511 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 92% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 468 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 8% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 43 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal86%, Saysiyat3%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: o~u~uɾaj itiniaj i wo~u~uɾai ʦən no~u nəw taipəi ʦitj ko~u o~u~uɾaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, paiwan*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ. o~u~uɾaj itiniaj i *iansħi ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u o~u~uɾaj a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, sajsijat*.*%, ro~uma*.*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ. o~u~uɾaj itiniaj i wo~u~ufəŋ ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u o~u~uɾaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, sajsijat*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Ulay Itiniay i Wulai Cen no New Taipei City ko Ulay a niyaro', 871 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,734 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 41% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 1,130 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 59% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,604 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal37%, Amis2%, Bunun1%, Paiwan1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'. Ulay Itiniay i Jianshi Cen no Hsinchu ko Ulay a niyaro', 45 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 210 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 97% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 204 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 3% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal95%, Bunun1%, Saysiyat0.5%, roma0.5%. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'. Ulay Itiniay i Wufeng Cen no Hsinchu ko Ulay a niyaro', 189 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 511 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 92% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 468 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 8% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 43 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal86%, Saysiyat3%, roma2%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko Kiwkay i niyaro'.
S.PHON: o~u~uɾaj itiniaj i wo~u~uɾai ʦən no~u nəw taipəi ʦitj ko~u o~u~uɾaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, amis*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, paiwan*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ. o~u~uɾaj itiniaj i *iansħi ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u o~u~uɾaj a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%, sajsijat*.*%, ro~uma*.*%. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ. o~u~uɾaj itiniaj i wo~u~ufəŋ ʦən no~u ħsinʦħo~u~u ko~u o~u~uɾaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u tajaɾ**%, sajsijat*%, ro~uma*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u kiwkaj i nijaro~uʡ.
